seoTitle: Revesby vs Revesby Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Revesby and Revesby Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Revesby vs Revesby Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Revesby and Revesby Heights.
heading: Revesby vs Revesby Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Revesby, New South Wales and Revesby Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Revesby has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Revesby Heights (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Revesby or Revesby Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Revesby has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Revesby Heights scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Revesby scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Revesby Heights scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Revesby or Revesby Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Revesby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
